signatureMove.name: Rooted
signatureMove.extraText: This model cannot move or be moved and has its Melee Range increased to 3" until end of the current activation.
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If this character was not slain then it restores 1 Wd.

abilities.name: Woodroot
abilities.description: This character may Jog over Wooded Patches.

abilities.name: Ponderous
abilities.description: This character cannot take Reaction Steps.

abilities.name: Knotted Branches
abilities.description: If this character deals Impact Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +2.

abilities.name: Bark Skin
abilities.description: If this character suffers Piercing or Slicing Dmg, reduce the Dmg suffered by -1.

abilities.name: Forest
abilities.description: After this character suffers Dmg, it may restore 1 Wd for each Wooded Patch within 4". Once per turn.

arcaneOutcomes.text: Move target enemy X+2" directly towards any friendly Treefolk. Then the target suffers 1 Wd for each Wooded Patch within 4" of it.
This model cannot move or be moved and has its Melee Range increased to 3" until end of turn.
